chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 782 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 27-04-2023 Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. ***** Mr. Danish Ali Bhatti, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, counsel for the petitioners and under instructions, does not press the instant petition, which stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
